essence: Maintains and repairs electrical systems in industrial plants to ensure continuous production.

identity.title: Industrial Maintenance Electrician
identity.summary: Installs, inspects, and repairs electrical equipment, motors, and control systems in manufacturing environments to minimise downtime.

salary.notes: Shift work and hazardous‑area certifications can increase pay.

qualifications: Experience with industrial motors, drives, and control panels
Knowledge of electrical safety and lockout/tagout
Ability to read schematics and perform fault finding

lifestyle.description: Hands‑on role with a mix of planned maintenance and reactive repairs; often shift‑based in factories or plants.

habits: Performs electrical fault diagnosis and repairs
Maintains motors, drives, and control panels
Works with maintenance teams to schedule outages
